title: cyperus lhotskyanus
intro: Cyperus lhotskyanus, also known as the Lhotsky's flatsedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the Cyperaceae family of plants. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions such as fever and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for its herbal remedies, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues, including skin problems and respiratory infections.
